mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, phone, region, detail, tag, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, name, phone, region, detail, tag, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM address WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, name, phone, region, detail, tag, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{region}, #{detail}, #{tag}, #{isDefault})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM address WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
